title: Frequently Asked Questions
meta_description: Find answers to common questions about trauma therapy, EMDR, insurance, rates, and more at Wildwood Psychotherapy in Leesburg, Virginia.

faqs.question: What are some of the things people come to you for?
faqs.answer: Common concerns I help with include: trauma (complex as well as single-incident), anxiety, perfectionism, relationship struggles, depression, attachment issues, low self-esteem, life transitions, and grief.

faqs.question: What does EMDRIA Certified Therapist™ mean?
faqs.answer: Therapists can practice EMDR after basic training. Being an EMDRIA Certified Therapist™ is a designation granted to clinicians who have completed advanced training and extensive supervised practice, demonstrating a high level of expertise and commitment to EMDRIA’s rigorous standards.

faqs.question: Do you take insurance?
faqs.answer: I am an out-of-network provider and do not bill insurance directly. Choosing to work outside of insurance protects your privacy and gives us flexibility to move at a pace that supports meaningful, trauma-informed work. I can provide a superbill for potential reimbursement.

faqs.question: Where are you located?
faqs.answer: The office is located in historic downtown Leesburg at **19 Wirt St SW** near Town Hall. It's in the same building as Shake and Bops Botanical Cafe, on the 2nd floor. The office itself is tucked away behind a private brick walkway to ensure privacy.

faqs.question: Do you offer virtual therapy?
faqs.answer: Yes. I offer secure virtual therapy for clients located anywhere in Virginia. Many clients find virtual sessions to be just as effective as in-person ones.

faqs.question: What is your cancellation policy?
faqs.answer: At least 24 hours' notice is required for cancellations. Appointments cancelled with less than 24 hours' notice will be charged the full session fee.
